cards.title: Raising Boys Who Don't Like Sports
cards.body: Non-sporty boys face cultural pressure in a society that prizes athletic talent and competitiveness in males. Parents navigating this challenge must find alternative ways to build confidence and resilience in their sons.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Wellbeing
cards.body: Estrangement exists on a continuum rather than as a binary choice. Support systems play a crucial role in helping family members navigate reduced contact and potential reconciliation.

cards.title: Teaching Boys Differently Than Girls
cards.body: Former England manager Gareth Southgate argues for differentiated approaches to raising boys and young men. His documentary explores the specific issues affecting male youth development.

cards.title: Childcare Costs: Government Action Needed
cards.body: Billions are being spent on childcare support, but hidden charges may prevent families from benefiting fully. Minister Bridget Phillipson pledges to stop profiteers from undermining assistance programs.

cards.title: Adult Children Managing Aging Parent Care
cards.body: Caring for aging parents involves balancing autonomy, safety, and personal wellbeing. This expected life transition requires clear boundaries and support strategies.
